scripts.build: asc src/index.ts --outFile build/OpnetardNFT.wasm --optimizeLevel 3 --shrinkLevel 1 --converge --enable sign-extension --enable mutable-globals --enable nontrapping-f2i --enable bulk-memory --enable simd --enable reference-types --enable multi-value --runtime stub --memoryBase 0 --initialMemory 1 --exportStart start --transform @btc-vision/opnet-transform --use abort=src/index/abort
